---
title: Tools for publishing research
# subtitle: 
date: 2026-06-11
author: Jaime Ruiz Serra
categories: [research, tools, writing]
# bibliography: references.bib
---


1. Math diagrams: 
    - [Asymptote](https://asymptote.ualberta.ca/) (online)
    - TikZ

2. Presentations:
    - Beamer
    - BeamerQT
